# Highlight Test

This is a ==highlighted== text.
Here is a highlight with ==**bold**== text.
And one with ==*italic*==.
And one with ==`inline code`==.
And a ==[link](https://example.com)==.

It also supports consecutive highlights: ==one== and ==two==.
And multiline within the same block:
This is a ==highlight
that spans two lines==.

Invalid ones:
====
==
text==
==text
